question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks no didactic questions. It dumps a complete solution and explanations, then only responds to questions the Student initiates.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are framed by the Tutor; no choices or forks are surfaced for the user to engage with.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no pedagogical scaffolding — the full solution is given upfront, and follow-up explanations are reactive to the Student's curiosity rather than progressive.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and explanations (e.g., the len(list) vs sum tradeoff) are clear and actionable, but flow is one-directional lecture rather than dialogic teaching.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
